name: Kaltura API Guides
description: Live-tested API guides for Kaltura — The Agentic Digital Experience Platform. Covers authentication, content management, search, player embed, AI-powered enrichment, conversational AI, virtual events, multi-stream, and more. For AI agents and developers.
rules: All API examples use curl with shell variables ($SERVICE_URL, $KS, $PARTNER_ID). Adapt to the developer's target language.
Kaltura API v3 uses form-encoded POST with format=1 for JSON responses. Modern APIs (Events, Agents, Genie) use JSON with Bearer or KS auth headers.
Always include format=1 in API v3 requests to get JSON responses.
Upload lifecycle: uploadToken.add → uploadToken.upload → media.add → media.addContent.
Auth differs by API: v3 uses -d 'ks=$KS' form param, Events/Agents use Bearer $KS header, Genie uses KS $KS header.
Use AppTokens (appToken.startSession with HMAC) for production integrations instead of raw admin secrets.
